current_phase_name: Security, Privacy and Public Repository Hardening

phase_history.name: Supervisor, Lease, Fencing and Mock Worker
phase_history.approval_note: Merge pre-authorized by user 2026-07-07 conditional on green CI; CI green.

phase_history.name: Artifact, Workspace and Lightweight History
phase_history.approval_note: Merge pre-authorized by user 2026-07-07 conditional on green CI; CI green.

phase_history.name: Retrieval Training and Model Selection
phase_history.note: Deployable retriever via AUP-005 pivot: CT-CLIP recall (held-out R@10 0.511) + findings-grounded explainable re-rank (0.522/0.533). From-scratch PointNet++ retained as documented negative result.

phase_history.name: Qdrant Index and Real Retrieval Integration
phase_history.note: CT-CLIP embeddings in Qdrant + findings-grounded explainable re-rank API + real CT-CLIP GPU worker replacing the P4 mock.

phase_history.name: Professional Frontend Design and Core UI
phase_history.note: Clinical Workstation UI (design gate delegated to AI): bilingual search with findings-chip explanations, viewer/tasks tabs, live engine status.

phase_history.name: Full History, Export and User Workflow
phase_history.note: Save/revisit/export searches (JSON+CSV with formula-injection hardening); History UI.

next_entry_gate: P18 entry: P17 approved and merged -> Backup, Restore & Failure Recovery.

remaining_phases.P13: Qdrant Index & Real Retrieval Integration (CT-CLIP embeddings + re-rank/explanations + real GPU worker)
remaining_phases.P14: Professional Frontend Design & Core UI (3 design directions -> user selects; bilingual/voice query, viewer, explained results; no segmentation view) [USER GATE]
remaining_phases.P15: Full History, Export & User Workflow (minus segmentation artifacts)
remaining_phases.P17: Security, Privacy & Public Repository Hardening (+ CC-BY-NC-SA attribution / share-alike / non-commercial notice)
remaining_phases.P18: Backup, Restore & Failure Recovery (incl. 1.7 GB CT-CLIP checkpoint as un-committed restorable artifact)
remaining_phases.P19: Full Integration, Performance & Regression (incl. CT-CLIP latency + ~2.5 GB VRAM in the serving path)
remaining_phases.P20: Freeze Run, Documentation & Public Release (against the AUP-005-amended Freeze Test Profile)

P12.held_out_retrieval: passing (CT-CLIP R@10 0.511 on leakage-free CT-RATE valid)

architecture.document: Architecture Specification Bundle v2.4.5 — Clean Consolidated Edition
architecture.change_rule: If an architecture-related issue is found, stop implementation. Update and review the architecture documentation first, obtain user approval, then update the Master Plan and implementation.

execution_governance.phase_execution_mode: Complete all subphases in the current phase sequentially, test each subphase independently, then submit the whole phase for user review.
phase_exit_report_effective_when: Corresponding pull request is merged into main

project_goal.primary: Build a high-quality portfolio project that remains maintainable and extensible.
priority_order: History, export, voice and bilingual UX
Text-guided 3D segmentation if feasible, without sacrificing retrieval

deployment.demo_target: Local execution with reproducibility on other computers through Docker

git_workflow.branch_model: One branch and pull request per phase
git_workflow.issue_policy: AI decides based on phase complexity and risk

ci_cd.critical_test_policy: AI classifies criticality and must explain the basis. Architecture consistency, data integrity, security, recovery, core functionality and regression tests are critical by default.
ci_cd.noncritical_failure_policy: Allowed only with a Known Issues / Test Exceptions Report.

data.download_strategy: Prepare the full CT-RATE dataset where practical, but train initially on subsets.

training.local_strategy: Develop and validate on small subsets locally before cloud training
training.ct_clip_policy: May reference CT-CLIP data processing, training strategy and evaluation methods, but must not load incompatible CT image encoder weights into PointNet++.

segmentation.rationale: User decision; consistent with planned_experimental status and the recorded rule that retrieval has priority if time conflicts. Its stated architecture (frozen PointNet++ + text-conditioned head) is moot since PointNet++ is no longer the deployed encoder.

retrieval_architecture.deployed_recall: CT-CLIP (CT-ViT image tower + text tower), CC-BY-NC-SA, local inference ~2.25 GB VRAM
retrieval_architecture.original_contribution: findings-grounded explainable re-ranking layer (reorders top-K by clinical-findings agreement; renders shared findings as the reason)
retrieval_architecture.held_out_metrics: CT-CLIP recall R@10 0.511 (90 held-out CT-RATE valid volumes); + re-rank best R@10 0.522 (CT->text) / 0.533 (text->CT)
retrieval_architecture.superseded_encoder: PointNet++ point-cloud encoder (P9/P11/P12a-b) reclassified as documented research; removed from the serving path after five approaches plateaued at 1.0-1.5x random
retrieval_architecture.licence_obligation: CT-CLIP + CT-RATE are CC-BY-NC-SA: non-commercial only, attribution required, derivatives share-alike (enforced in P17)

frontend.design_process: AI presents 3 visual directions and key page mockups before implementation; user selects one.
frontend.text_retrieval_language: Chinese and English input; Chinese is translated locally into English before retrieval
frontend.report_generation: No generated radiology report; show retrieved similar reports, similarity and segmentation results.

history.save_ct: Required for complete history where the selected profile calls for it

hard_constraints: Do not skip or reorder phases.
Do not execute subphases in parallel.
Do not enter the next phase without user approval.
Do not bypass, weaken or delete tests to obtain a pass.
Do not fabricate test, training or evaluation results.
Do not silently modify architecture-related behavior in code.
When an architecture-related problem is found, stop implementation and update the architecture documentation first.
Do not change database schemas without recorded migration and documentation.
Do not perform irreversible operations without user approval.
Do not delete important data or overwrite important files without user approval.
Do not merge a phase pull request until required tests pass and the user approves.
All training runs must record configuration, random seed, code revision and dataset revision.
All failures and exceptions must be recorded.
Phase Exit Reports are the authoritative phase-status records after approval and merge.
pending_decisions: Exact dependency versions and image digests will be locked during P0.
Exact Celery/Redis broker parameters will be locked during the control-plane phases.
Exact PointNet++ layer configuration and training hyperparameters will be selected through small-scale experiments.
Exact lightweight local Chinese-to-English translation model will be selected during the translation phase.
Final frontend visual direction will be selected from three AI-generated design proposals.

next_action.instruction: Generate the P0 Phase Execution Plan, verify all authoritative documents, lock repository standards and dependencies, initialize GitHub Flow and CI, then execute P0 subphases sequentially.

state_authority.primary: Approved and merged Phase Exit Report
state_authority.conflict_policy: Stop execution, run a consistency audit, report the mismatch and wait for the user's decision.

merge_authorization: auto-merge on green CI resumed from P8 (user 2026-07-07); still pause for resource/architecture/destructive decisions
